subject: Order not delivered - urgent
description: My order ORD-7001 was supposed to arrive 3 days ago. I've been waiting and tracking shows no updates. This is unacceptable. I need this resolved immediately or I will cancel my account.

comments.author: agent_alex
comments.body: Hi Sarah, we're looking into this for you.

comments.author: cust_201
comments.body: Still waiting. This is ridiculous. I've been a customer for years and this is the worst experience I've had.

subject: Billing discrepancy on last invoice
description: I was charged $450 instead of the agreed $350 on my latest invoice INV-3022. This is the second time this has happened. I'm very frustrated and considering switching providers.

comments.author: agent_jane
comments.body: Marcus, I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me review your invoice.

comments.author: cust_202
comments.body: I'm disappointed this keeps happening. I need this fixed today.

subject: Production API returning 500 errors since yesterday
description: Our production integration with /api/v2/sync has been failing since yesterday morning. This is a critical issue causing revenue impact. We need this resolved asap - our entire pipeline is down.

comments.author: agent_mike
comments.body: Diana, we've identified the issue and our engineering team is working on it.

comments.author: cust_203
comments.body: It's been over 24 hours now. This is unacceptable for an enterprise account. We're losing revenue every hour this is down.

subject: Feature request: bulk export
description: Would be great to have a bulk export option for reports. Not urgent, just a nice-to-have for our workflow.

subject: Login issues after password reset
description: I reset my password yesterday but still cannot log in. I've tried clearing cache and using incognito. Appreciate any help!
